scope: Project-level reusable multi-state character reference board for Meng Guizang, the Old Book Society dead-book archivist and Ashen Academy survivor.

locked_references.role: global low-magic eastern epic mood lock
project material and tactile surface lock
Zhaoming relic material reference for partial burned archive evidence only
Qingming insect-wax and confiscation material reference for archive evidence only
locked Zhaoming emblem reference; use only as broken document pressure mark or seal fragment, do not redesign
locked Suming/Qingming emblem reference; use only as small damaged wax/confiscation evidence, do not redesign

downstream_usage: Old Book Society survivor costume and archive-prop handoff
Qingming confiscation evidence and Zhaoming relic fragment handling reference

batch_rules: Do not redesign existing faction emblems.
Do not invent an Old Book Society crest, badge, sleeve mark, or bookplate logo.
Use Zhaoming sun-moon language only as broken burned document evidence or partial seal residue, never as a clean public emblem.
Use Suming/Qingming language only as insect-wax closure or confiscation evidence on archive fragments, never as Meng Guizang's wearable identity.

Keep Meng Guizang's costume complete, functional, and profession-specific: deep grey scholar travel robe, smoke-black book-box harness, blackened book box, paper clips, bone page clips, wax pouches, and old book cords.
Distress surfaces through scorched edges, ash marks, smoke dulling, damp reed overwrap, wax scrape, and paper burn; avoid beggar rags, gore, and horror burn spectacle.
No visible text, labels, captions, UI, watermark, Chinese characters, or Latin letters inside generated images.
